name: Flighted Golf Sim
about: Flighted Golf Sim is a premier indoor golf range and simulator facility in Honolulu, Hawaii. It features 8 state-of-the-art hitting bays equipped with Foresight Sports simulators, providing detailed swing data and analytics for immediate feedback. The venue offers a variety of services including simulator practice on world-famous courses, customized instruction, and tournament events. Pricing is based on time slots and packages, with options ranging from 30-minute sessions to multi-hour bookings and practice lesson bundles.
why_golfers_like_it: Equipped with 8 state-of-the-art Foresight Sports simulators for unmatched accuracy
Real-time data tracking provides instant feedback on every shot with detailed metrics
Ability to play on some of the world's most iconic and exclusive golf courses
Customizable practice sessions and lessons to target specific skill areas
Spacious facility with private rooms for groups and parties

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site. BYOB policy not specified.
No mention of alcohol service available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: 8 state-of-the-art hitting bays powered by Foresight Sports simulators

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, Flighted Golf Sim offers a selection of golf clubs for your convenience, but you are welcome to bring your own clubs if you prefer.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no specific mention of a food and drink policy on their website. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for inquiries regarding outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an exact time for playing a full 18 holes. Time is billed by the session (30 minutes to 2+ hours) or through package deals, so duration depends on the package selected and player speed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Flighted Golf Sim is kid-friendly. They offer specific junior lesson packages, private party rooms suitable for events, and a welcoming environment for families to practice and play together.
